overall.description: Gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking along a neon-lit commercial street in Night City at night. The scene features prominent green neon signage with Japanese text reading 'Eye Implant', futuristic vehicles, and various pedestrians before the character turns into a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk through the neon-lit district, passing various pedestrians and observing futuristic traffic on the adjacent street

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in tactical jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall commercial building with illuminated green facade and vertical red accents
large glowing pink Japanese text reading 'Eye Implant' mounted on the building facade
multi-lane urban road with moving traffic and red lane markings
futuristic cars and trucks driving along the street with headlights on

segments.scene_description: The segment depicts a walk along a bustling cyberpunk city street at night. The camera moves past a prominent green building with glowing Japanese signage while various pedestrians walk in opposing directions. Futuristic vehicles drive by on the multi-lane street to the right, illuminated by neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement.

events.description: turning left from the street sidewalk toward the building entrance
entering the covered lobby area of the commercial building

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking into the building entrance, transitioning from the outdoor neon-lit street to the interior lobby space

entered.detail: glass doorway entrance with illuminated interior and reflective flooring
covered lobby area with ceiling lights and modern interior design

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the bustling street and approaches the entrance of the green commercial building. The scene transitions from the exposed neon-lit sidewalk to a sheltered lobby with artificial lighting and marble flooring, leaving the street traffic behind as the character moves into the interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit city street into the quiet interior of a commercial building. It begins by gliding past a prominent green building adorned with glowing Japanese signage, moving through a crowd of pedestrians while futuristic vehicles pass on the right. As the camera progresses, the vibrant reflections of neon lights on the wet pavement fade while the perspective shifts toward the building's entrance. The scene then transitions from the exposed, noisy sidewalk into a sheltered lobby, where the chaotic street traffic is replaced by artificial lighting and polished marble flooring.
